calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberley Fonner for and with Michelle Eatman (Administrator). James Kaller for and with Rene Fontenot.

Mr. Kaller presented the Court with a letter from Dr. Baker from the University of California at San Francisco General Hospital. Ms. Fonner informed the Court that she agreed to perform the work at an hourly rate that would not exceed the statutory rate/fee. In addition, she stated that there would be enough funds to pay the Administrator. The Court found that Rene is a person with a disability and ordered that his share be distributed to a special needs trust. The Court granted the petition, (subject to review of the written order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jackson.
